summary: Your Spring 2026 payment buttons are now active. Chaska and Easton each have a Pay Now row for their remaining Brighton/Greece Spring balances ($383.12 and $383.13 — $766.25 total).
How to pay: sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments → Upcoming Payments → click Pay Now on each child's row and complete checkout.
Your $90.00 sibling discount credit will apply automatically at checkout and reduce the card charge.
Winter enrollments remain as previously corrected. Your 2026 membership is paid in full.
Spring session ends June 12. Reply to this email if anything looks wrong on your Payments page.
